evidenceChecked: Exact detached candidate 2fb4bf7e180bd5a6c2c49380113cb7f8e0bb0c1a; manifest identity PREM-LPP-003 version 0.1.2 and all ten manifest-declared scene sources

content/010-orientation.md through content/100-synthesis.md: semantic source order, heading hierarchy, table equivalents, prompt-before-feedback paths, recovery guidance, modality alternatives, and educational boundaries
assessment.json: no time limit, retakeable policy, text-capable responses, equivalent retry strategy, reasoning-rich feedback, and non-presentation-based scoring

Generated site/data/lessons/PREM-LPP-003.json and reader route: ten semantic scenes, one h1 per compiled scene, table headers, structured assessment/answer/rights content, and no unsafe generated tags

Manual Chromium checks at 1280x720, 640x720 reflow-equivalent width, and 390x844: keyboard frame advance, narrow navigation focus return, zero page overflow, bounded tables, reduced-motion preference, continuous reading, and complete print content
lesson.json, claims.json, glossary.json, and ATTRIBUTION.md: accountable principal, author-agent disclosure, CC BY 4.0 grant, bounded claims, fictional-data declarations, and zero third-party assets
references.json: ten source records, facts-only original-expression uses, concrete rights-basis evidence, dated agent-access records, displayed licenses, exact locators, and no human-only source

Public NCBI E-utilities, Crossref REST API, and ERIC access/terms surfaces referenced by the ledger; no login, bypass, redistributed abstract, publisher full text, dataset, quotation, or media was used in this review
npm run validate; 30 protocol tests; 22 runnable Playwright tests, with 12 container-only CSP tests skipped by their declared environment guard

findings.target: content/010-orientation.md; content/030-concept.md; content/040-worked-example.md; content/070-practice.md; content/090-assessment.md; content/100-synthesis.md; generated reader
findings.finding: The core outcome has equivalent semantic routes: explanatory relationships are stated in ordinary source order, both instructional tables have linear prose equivalents, no distinction depends on color, position, motion, sound, hover, dragging, or timing, and learner responses may use keyboard text or speech-to-text without changing the rubric. Manual keyboard, narrow-width, reduced-motion, continuous-reading, and print checks preserved scenes, assessment prompts, answer reasoning, references, focus return, and bounded overflow.

Rights, privacy, security, and provenance are defensible within the declared scope. Original lesson content is granted under CC BY 4.0; all ten sources are declared as facts-only research with source-specific evidence, current agent-access observations, and no human-only record; no quotation, adapted expression, dataset extraction, redistributed media, third-party asset, identifiable learner or patient data, secret, active SVG, executable content, remote embed, or unsafe clinical instruction appears. The accountable principal and material author-agent provenance are disclosed consistently.

Assessment access is outcome-equivalent rather than presentation-dependent: attempts are untimed and retakeable, all scored responses have text modes or an ordinary single-choice route, presentation style is expressly unscored, remediation is item-specific, and changed-form retries preserve the outcome. The generated continuous-reading and print paths expose the structured prompts, reasoning, and feedback in full.

limitations: This is an accessibility-and-rights evidence review, not legal advice; copyright, privacy, contract, and accessibility obligations may vary by jurisdiction and deployment context.

Manual interaction checks used headless Chromium at representative desktop, reflow-equivalent, and narrow widths. No hands-on test was performed with a human screen-reader, braille-display, switch-control, voice-control, low-vision, or cognitive-accessibility user, and no physical touch device was available.

Publisher full texts were not opened. Original-synthesis and close-paraphrase review used the candidate prose, its detailed facts-only ledger, repository-owned standards, public bibliographic/abstract-access terms, and declared source-use boundaries; it cannot prove the absence of every coincidental textual similarity.

The 12 container-only CSP/security-header tests were skipped by the repository's environment guard. Source validation, active-content rejection, generated-tag inspection, and all 22 runnable browser tests passed, but deployed container headers were not independently exercised in this run.
